mapper.sql: select order_id, order_no, user_id, package_id, credits_amount, bonus_credits, pay_network, pay_token, pay_amount, pay_amount_display, wallet_address, from_address, status, order_type, tx_hash, payment_tx_id, paid_at, completed_at, expire_at, create_time, update_time from virtual_recharge_order
mapper.select: where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into virtual_recharge_order (order_no, user_id, package_id, credits_amount, bonus_credits, pay_network, pay_token, pay_amount, pay_amount_display, wallet_address, from_address, status, order_type, expire_at, create_time) values (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{packageId}, #{creditsAmount}, #{bonusCredits}, #{payNetwork}, #{payToken}, #{payAmount}, #{payAmountDisplay}, #{walletAddress}, #{fromAddress}, #{status}, #{orderType}, #{expireAt}, sysdate())
